title: FURNISH HOPE - 211info
text: FURNISH HOPE FURNISH HOPE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a furniture bank of new and gently used household items, including kitchen basics such as dishes, glassware, bake ware, small appliances, utensils, pot, pans, home furniture, bedding, and cleaning supplies. 1006 SE 9th Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Varies by referral partner, but household must meet at least one of the following: -Individuals transitioning out of homelessness or recovery -People with disabilities or medical challenges -Refugees and people fleeing domestic violence -Foster youth and families, and aged-out foster teenagers -Veteran in the household -Families who have lost a home to a natural disaster Hours: Monday-Saturday 9am-11am (541) 638-0657 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 638-0657 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website. Must be referred through an approved referral partner. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Donation Center Services: Bedding/Linen Cleaning Products Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Furniture Kitchenware Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FURNISH HOPE
